news.headline: Ex-wife of Dubai ruler's nephew arrested in custody dispute
news.summary:
<p>The ex-wife of a nephew of Dubai’s ruler has been arrested following a long-running custody battle, prosecutors in the UAE said on Friday.</p>
<p>Zeynab Javadli was detained after her former husband, Sheikh Saeed bin Maktoum bin Rashid Al Maktoum, accused her of abducting their
